'''ngakono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:prabhu|prabhu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:prabhu|prabhu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngakono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngækeneth|ngækeneth]] || [[word:ngækenej|ngækenej]] || [[word:ngækenesh|ngækenesh]] || [[word:ngækene|ngækene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakokonoth|ngakokonoth]] || [[word:ngakokonoj|ngakokonoj]] || [[word:ngakokonosh|ngakokonosh]] || [[word:ngakokono|ngakokono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakonoth|ngakonoth]] || [[word:ngakonoj|ngakonoj]] || [[word:ngakonosh|ngakonosh]] || [[word:ngakono|ngakono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakofnoth|ngakofnoth]] || [[word:ngakofnoj|ngakofnoj]] || [[word:ngakofnosh|ngakofnosh]] || [[word:ngakofnof|ngakofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngakonotho|ngakonotho]] || [[word:ngakonojo|ngakonojo]] || [[word:ngakonosho|ngakonosho]] || [[word:ngakonoko|ngakonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngakonoth|ngakonoth]] || [[word:ngakonoj|ngakonoj]] || [[word:ngakonosh|ngakonosh]] || [[word:ngakono|ngakono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngakonothol|ngakonothol]] || [[word:ngakonojol|ngakonojol]] || [[word:ngakonoshol|ngakonoshol]] || [[word:ngakonokol|ngakonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngakonothotho|ngakonothotho]] || [[word:ngakonojojo|ngakonojojo]] || [[word:ngakonoshosho|ngakonoshosho]] || [[word:ngakonoko|ngakonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngakonothon|ngakonothon]] || [[word:ngakonojon|ngakonojon]] || [[word:ngakonoshon|ngakonoshon]] || [[word:ngakonokon|ngakonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngakonothoro|ngakonothoro]] || [[word:ngakonojoro|ngakonojoro]] || [[word:ngakonoshoro|ngakonoshoro]] || [[word:ngakonokoro|ngakonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
